sections.paragraph: Ezr 2:27 מִכְמָשׁ 1Sa 13:2, 1Sa 13:5 מִכְמַשׁ Neh 11:31 (“laid up,” “treasure,” from the root כָּמַס), [Michmas, Michmash], pr.n. of a town in the tribe of Benjamin, situated to the west of Bethaven, 1Sa 13:5 Gr. Μαχμάς, 1Ma_9:73 in Josephus, Μαχμά, Ant. xiii. 1, § 6 . [now Mŭkmâs, مخماس Rob. ii. 113].
